---
title: "baseballr Data Access"
author: "Trevor Hunt"
date: today
format: html
---

# Introduction

This notebook will serve as an exploration for the `baseballr` package in R.

```{r}
library(baseballr)
library(dplyr)
```

To start, I'm going to download the Chadwick Bureau's public register of baseball players and save that as an RDS for reuse:

```{r}
player_lu <- chadwick_player_lu()

saveRDS(player_lu, "data/raw/chadwick_player_lu.rds")
```
